title: 🤝 How to Add Liquidity on STON.fi
description_short:
📍 Global | 🕐 April 25, 2026  
💼 Liquidity Provision Guide | 🔗 TON Blockchain

Adding liquidity on STON.fi lets you earn a share of trading fees by depositing token pairs into pools on the TON bloc...
description_full:
📍 Global | 🕐 April 25, 2026  
💼 Liquidity Provision Guide | 🔗 TON Blockchain

Adding liquidity on STON.fi lets you earn a share of trading fees by depositing token pairs into pools on the TON blockchain. Choose between balanced or arbitrary modes, and always keep extra TON for network fees.

🚀 Getting Started  
• Connect a TON wallet (Tonkeeper or Tonhub) to app.ston.fi  
• Hold both tokens of your chosen pair plus TON for fees  
• Review pool metrics: TVL, 24h volume, and APR

📍 Step 1: Access Pools  
• Go to app.ston.fi and click “Pools”  
• Search for your token pair (example: STON/TON)  
• Check token icons, TVL, volume, and APR before proceeding

🔄 Step 2: Choose Provision Mode  
• Click “Add liquidity” on the pool page  
• Balanced mode (default): enter one amount, app auto-matches the other  
• Arbitrary mode (v2 pools): deposit in any ratio or single token

👀 Step 3: Preview Deposit  
• Click “Preview liquidity provision”  
• Review your pool share, indicative APR, and fees  
• Swap for missing tokens if needed

✅ Step 4: Confirm Transaction  
• Click “Confirm liquidity provision”  
• Approve in your wallet  
• Contract deposits tokens and mints LP tokens to your address

📊 Step 5: Manage Position  
• View under “Pools” > “My pools”  
• Monitor earned fees (auto-accrued)  
• Add more liquidity, remove, or stake LP tokens in farms

💡 Best Practices  
• Prefer larger pools for lower price impact  
• Be aware of impermanent loss in volatile pairs  
• Start with small amounts to test  
• Withdraw anytime via “Remove liquidity”

🔗 Full guide:  
https://guide.ston.fi/EN/providing-liquidity/how-to-provide-liquidity-on-ston.fi
